disambiguated.context: Two people were sitting together at breakfast talking about the diets they had just recently started as part of their new year's resolution this year, one thin and the other obese. The thin friend was optimistic about continuing the diet, as it had been going pretty well so far, but the obese person wasn't optimistic at all, as they had already already broken the diet half a dozen times and it wasn't even March yet.
disambiguated.question: Who fails at dieting?
